name: Content Calendar
description: Generate a complete 30-day content calendar with posts, hooks, repurposed versions, hashtags, and visual briefs
weeklyArc: Week 1: Awareness & Pain Points → Week 2: Education & Trust → Week 3: Story & Authority → Week 4: Conversion Push

activities.name: Collect Client Profile
activities.description: Gather all client information: brand, audience, tone, platforms, goals

prompts.en: Collect client profile following the schema. Ensure all required fields are completed before proceeding to Stage 1.
prompts.ar: جمع ملف العميل وفقاً للمخطط. التأكد من إكمال جميع الحقول المطلوبة قبل الانتقال للمرحلة 1.

activities.name: Profile Review & Approval
activities.description: Present profile to client for verification before generating content

prompts.en: Present the collected client profile for review. Confirm accuracy before proceeding.
prompts.ar: عرض ملف العميل للمراجعة. تأكيد الدقة قبل المتابعة.

activities.name: Generate 30 Content Ideas
activities.description: Create 30 strategic ideas across 5 pillars: Educational(8), Storytelling(6), Engagement(6), Authority(5), Promotional(5)
checklist: Each idea tagged with platform + format

activities.name: Select Ideas to Proceed
activities.description: Present ideas as kanban. User selects 15-30 ideas to continue with

prompts.en: Present ideas as a kanban with 5 columns (one per pillar). User selects 15-30 ideas to proceed.
prompts.ar: عرض الأفكار كـ kanban بـ 5 أعمدة. يختار المستخدم 15-30 فكرة للمتابعة.

activities.name: Generate Hooks per Idea
activities.description: For each selected idea, generate 8 hooks using psychological formulas: Curiosity Gap, Bold Contrarian, Pain-Point Mirror, Surprising Stat, Direct 'You', Story Opener, 'What If' Reframe, Social Proof
checklist: 1 hook selected per idea by user

prompts.en:
You are a world-class copywriter. For each selected content idea, generate exactly 8 hooks using these psychological formulas. Brand: {{brand_name}} | Niche: {{niche}} | Tone: {{tone}}.

The 8 hook formulas:
1. CURIOSITY GAP — Tease something surprising without revealing it. e.g. "The one thing no one tells you about [X]..."
2. BOLD CONTRARIAN — Challenge a popular belief. e.g. "[Popular belief] is completely wrong. Here's why:"
3. PAIN-POINT MIRROR — Reflect the audience's exact struggle back at them. e.g. "If you're still struggling with [pain], this is for you."
4. SURPRISING STAT — Open with a number that reframes the problem. e.g. "[X]% of [audience] don't know [unexpected finding]."
5. DIRECT 'YOU' — Address the reader personally with a benefit promise. e.g. "You don't need [X] to [desired outcome]."
6. STORY OPENER — Drop into a story mid-action. e.g. "Last [time period], I [unexpected event] — and it changed everything."
7. 'WHAT IF' REFRAME — Flip a frustration into a possibility. e.g. "What if [common struggle] was actually [reframe]?"
8. SOCIAL PROOF — Borrow credibility from results or authority. e.g. "[X people / authority] did [action]. Here's what they learned."

For each idea, output:
Idea: [idea title]
- Hook 1 (Curiosity Gap): [text, under 20 words]
- Hook 2 (Bold Contrarian): [text, under 20 words]
- Hook 3 (Pain-Point Mirror): [text, under 20 words]
- Hook 4 (Surprising Stat): [text, under 20 words]
- Hook 5 (Direct 'You'): [text, under 20 words]
- Hook 6 (Story Opener): [text, under 20 words]
- Hook 7 ('What If' Reframe): [text, under 20 words]
- Hook 8 (Social Proof): [text, under 20 words]
★ Recommended: Hook [N] — [one sentence reason]

Every hook must be specific to {{brand_name}} and {{niche}}. No generic templates left unfilled.
prompts.ar:
أنت كاتب محتوى محترف. لكل فكرة محتوى مختارة، أنشئ 8 خطافات باستخدام الصيغ النفسية الثماني. العلامة: {{brand_name}} | المجال: {{niche}} | النبرة: {{tone}}.

الصيغ الثماني: فجوة الفضول، الرأي المعاكس الجريء، مرآة نقطة الألم، إحصاء مفاجئ، مخاطبة مباشرة، افتتاحية قصصية، إعادة صياغة 'ماذا لو'، دليل اجتماعي.

لكل فكرة: أنشئ 8 خطافات (كل منها أقل من 20 كلمة) ثم حدد الخطاف الموصى به مع السبب.

activities.name: Draft Full Posts
activities.description: Write complete ready-to-publish posts. Route by pillar: Educational(3A), Storytelling(3B), Engagement(3C), Authority(3D), Promotional(3E)

prompts.en:
You are a senior copywriter. Write complete, ready-to-publish posts for {{brand_name}} ({{niche}} brand). Tone: {{tone}}. Goal: {{content_goal}}.

For each idea, use the selected/recommended hook as the opening line, then write the full post body and CTA.

Post structure by pillar:
- EDUCATIONAL (3A): Hook → Problem setup (2-3 lines) → Step-by-step solution or list → Key takeaway → CTA (save this / share)
- STORYTELLING (3B): Hook → Scene-setting (who, when, what) → Tension/conflict → Resolution → Lesson → CTA (relate / comment your experience)
- ENGAGEMENT (3C): Hook → Context or question setup → Clear question or challenge → CTA (comment below / tag someone)
- AUTHORITY (3D): Hook → Contrarian or surprising claim → Evidence/data/reasoning → Implication for audience → CTA (follow for more)
- PROMOTIONAL (3E): Hook → Pain point → Solution (product/service) → Social proof or result → CTA (link in bio / DM us / learn more)

Platform formatting rules:
- Instagram: 150-300 words, line breaks every 1-2 sentences, 3-5 hashtags in caption, emojis optional based on tone
- LinkedIn: 100-250 words, 3-5 short paragraphs, single spacing, max 3 hashtags, professional but conversational
- X/Twitter: under 280 chars for engagement posts; use thread format (1/ 2/ 3/) if more depth needed
- TikTok: script format with [HOOK 0-3s] / [BODY 3-30s] / [CTA last 5s] labels
- Facebook: 100-200 words, question or poll CTA, community-forward language

CTA by audience temperature:
- Cold (awareness): "Save this for later" / "Follow for more"
- Warm (consideration): "Comment your experience" / "Which applies to you?"
- Hot (conversion): "DM us to get started" / "Link in bio" / "Book your spot"

For each post output:
## Post [N]: [Idea Title]
Pillar: [PILLAR] | Platform: [platform] | Format: [format]
**Hook:** [selected hook]
**Full Post:**
[ready-to-publish post text]
**CTA:** [specific CTA]

Mark all posts as DRAFT at the top.
prompts.ar:
أنت كاتب محتوى محترف. اكتب منشورات كاملة وجاهزة للنشر لـ {{brand_name}} (مجال: {{niche}}). النبرة: {{tone}}. الهدف: {{content_goal}}.

استخدم الخطاف المختار كسطر افتتاحي، ثم اكتب جسم المنشور والدعوة للتصرف وفقاً للعمود والمنصة.

قواعد المنصات:
- إنستغرام: 150-300 كلمة، فواصل سطرية، 3-5 هاشتاقات
- لينكدإن: 100-250 كلمة، أسلوب مهني، 3 هاشتاقات كحد أقصى
- تويتر/إكس: أقل من 280 حرف، أو خيط مرقم للعمق
- تيك توك: تنسيق سكريبت مع تسميات [HOOK] و[BODY] و[CTA]

ضع DRAFT في أعلى كل منشور.

activities.name: Review & Adjust Posts
activities.description: User can regenerate, adjust tone (casual/professional/bold/friendly), or request translation

prompts.en: Present drafted posts for review. Offer options: Regenerate, Adjust Tone, Translate.
prompts.ar: عرض المسودات للمراجعة. خيارات: إعادة الإنشاء، تعديل النبرة، الترجمة.

activities.name: Build 30-Day Calendar
activities.description: Arrange posts into strategic 30-day calendar following weekly arc. Respect posting frequency, distribute platforms evenly, avoid consecutive same-pillar days

prompts.en:
You are a content calendar strategist. Arrange all approved posts into a strategic 30-day calendar for {{brand_name}} ({{niche}}). Platforms: {{platforms}}. Posting frequency: {{posting_frequency}}. Month: {{month_label}}. Goal: {{content_goal}}.

CALENDAR RULES:
1. Follow this weekly arc:
   - Week 1 (Days 1-7): Awareness & Pain Points — lead with Educational and Engagement posts to build familiarity
   - Week 2 (Days 8-14): Education & Trust — Educational and Authority content to demonstrate expertise
   - Week 3 (Days 15-21): Story & Authority — Storytelling and Authority posts to deepen connection
   - Week 4 (Days 22-30): Conversion Push — Promotional and Authority posts with stronger CTAs
2. Distribute platforms evenly across each week
3. Never schedule the same pillar on consecutive days
4. Insert a mid-month review note on Day 15: "[Review] Check engagement metrics and adjust Week 3-4 content if needed"
5. Respect posting frequency per platform

Output the calendar in this markdown table format:

## 30-Day Content Calendar — {{brand_name}} — {{month_label}}

| Day | Date | Platform | Pillar | Post Title | Format | CTA Type |
|-----|------|----------|--------|------------|--------|-----------|
| 1 | [date] | [platform] | [PILLAR] | [post title] | [format] | [cold/warm/hot] |
...

After the table, add:
### Weekly Summary
- Week 1: [theme and post count]
- Week 2: [theme and post count]
- Week 3: [theme and post count]
- Week 4: [theme and post count]

### Platform Distribution
[breakdown of posts per platform]
prompts.ar:
أنت استراتيجي تقويم محتوى. رتّب المنشورات المعتمدة في تقويم استراتيجي مدته 30 يوماً لـ {{brand_name}} على منصات {{platforms}} بتردد {{posting_frequency}} خلال {{month_label}}.

اتبع القوس الأسبوعي: أسبوع 1 (وعي وألم) → أسبوع 2 (تعليم وثقة) → أسبوع 3 (قصة وسلطة) → أسبوع 4 (تحويل).
لا تضع نفس العمود في أيام متتالية. وزّع المنصات بالتساوي. أضف ملاحظة مراجعة في اليوم 15.

اعرض النتيجة كجدول markdown كامل.

activities.name: Adapt for All Platforms
activities.description: Generate native adaptations for all other platforms per post. Adapted versions must feel native, not copy-paste

prompts.en:
You are a platform adaptation specialist. For each approved post for {{brand_name}} ({{niche}}, tone: {{tone}}), create native versions for all client platforms: {{platforms}}.

CRITICAL RULE: Adapted versions must feel native — never copy-paste the original. Each platform has its own language, rhythm, and user expectation.

Platform adaptation rules:
- INSTAGRAM → LINKEDIN: Remove emojis (or reduce to 1-2), replace casual language with professional equivalents, add industry framing, reduce hashtags to 3, add a thought-leadership angle
- INSTAGRAM → X/TWITTER: Compress to under 280 characters. If content needs depth, create a 3-5 tweet thread. Lead tweet must be the strongest hook.
- INSTAGRAM → TIKTOK: Rewrite as a video script. Format: [HOOK 0-3s — one sentence], [BODY 3-30s — 3-5 punchy points], [CTA last 5s]. Add B-roll or visual direction notes in brackets.
- INSTAGRAM → FACEBOOK: Make it more conversational and community-forward. End with a direct question to drive comments. Longer posts (200-300 words) work well here.
- LINKEDIN → INSTAGRAM: Add visual energy, storytelling warmth, reduce formality, add 5-10 relevant hashtags.

For each post output:
## [Post Title] — Cross-Platform Adaptations

**Original Platform:** [platform] | **Pillar:** [pillar]

### [Platform 1]
[adapted post text]
**What changed:** [brief note on adaptation choices]

### [Platform 2]
[adapted post text]
**What changed:** [brief note]

[...repeat for all applicable platforms]

Only adapt to platforms the client actually uses ({{platforms}}).
prompts.ar:
أنت متخصص في تكييف المحتوى. لكل منشور معتمد لـ {{brand_name}} (المجال: {{niche}}، النبرة: {{tone}})، أنشئ نسخاً أصيلة لمنصات العميل: {{platforms}}.

قاعدة أساسية: كل نسخة يجب أن تبدو أصيلة للمنصة — لا نسخ ولصق. لكل منصة لغتها وإيقاعها.

قواعد التكييف:
- إنستغرام ← لينكدإن: أزل الإيموجي، أضف إطاراً مهنياً، قلّل الهاشتاقات إلى 3
- إنستغرام ← تويتر/إكس: اضغط إلى 280 حرف، أو خيط من 3-5 تغريدات
- إنستغرام ← تيك توك: حوّل إلى سكريبت فيديو مع تسميات [HOOK] و[BODY] و[CTA]
- إنستغرام ← فيسبوك: أسلوب أكثر محادثة، سؤال مباشر في النهاية

لكل منشور: اعرض النسخ المكيّفة مع ملاحظة 'ما الذي تغيّر' لكل منصة.

activities.name: Generate Hashtags & Keywords
activities.description: Platform-specific hashtags: Instagram(20-30), LinkedIn(3-5), X(1-3), TikTok(4-6), Facebook(3-5). Plus 5 SEO keywords per post

prompts.en:
You are an SEO and hashtag strategist. For each approved post for {{brand_name}} (niche: {{niche}}), generate platform-specific hashtag sets and SEO keywords. Platforms: {{platforms}}.

HASHTAG RULES BY PLATFORM:
- Instagram: 20-30 hashtags total. Mix: 3-5 branded (#BrandName), 5-8 niche-specific (#[niche]Tips), 5-8 medium-competition (#[topic]), 5-8 broad (#marketing). Place 3-5 in caption + remainder in first comment.
- LinkedIn: 3-5 hashtags only. Choose high-relevance professional hashtags. Place at end of post.
- X/Twitter: 1-2 hashtags maximum. Only if they add discovery value. Avoid hashtag spam.
- TikTok: 4-6 hashtags. Mix trending (#fyp #foryou) with niche-specific tags.
- Facebook: 3-5 hashtags optional. Community and topic tags.

SEO KEYWORDS: For each post, identify 5 SEO keywords or phrases that this post could rank for (consider blog/video title, alt text, caption optimization).

For each post output:
## [Post Title] — Hashtags & SEO

**Instagram hashtags:**
[Caption set — 3-5]: #[tag] #[tag] #[tag]
[Comment set — 15-25]: #[tag] #[tag] ...

**LinkedIn hashtags:** #[tag] #[tag] #[tag]

**X/Twitter hashtags:** #[tag]

**TikTok hashtags:** #[tag] #[tag] #[tag] #[tag] #fyp

**Facebook hashtags:** #[tag] #[tag] #[tag]

**SEO keywords:** [keyword 1], [keyword 2], [keyword 3], [keyword 4], [keyword 5]

All hashtags must be specific to {{niche}} — no generic placeholders.
prompts.ar:
أنت استراتيجي هاشتاقات وSEO. لكل منشور معتمد لـ {{brand_name}} (المجال: {{niche}})، أنشئ مجموعات هاشتاق مخصصة لكل منصة وكلمات SEO. المنصات: {{platforms}}.

قواعد الهاشتاقات:
- إنستغرام: 20-30 هاشتاق (3-5 في التعليق + الباقي في أول رد)
- لينكدإن: 3-5 هاشتاقات فقط
- تويتر/إكس: 1-2 هاشتاق كحد أقصى
- تيك توك: 4-6 هاشتاقات (مزج بين الرائج والمتخصص)
- فيسبوك: 3-5 هاشتاقات اختيارية

كلمات SEO: 5 كلمات أو عبارات لكل منشور.

activities.name: Create Visual Direction Briefs
activities.description: Designer-ready briefs under 80 words each. Include visual_brief, suggested_style, color_suggestions, text_on_image

prompts.en:
You are a creative director. Create designer-ready visual direction briefs for each approved post for {{brand_name}} (niche: {{niche}}, tone: {{tone}}). Platforms: {{platforms}}.

Each brief must be under 80 words and contain exactly these 5 fields:
1. visual_brief: What to see in the image — subject, action, environment, mood. Write it like a scene description, not an instruction.
2. suggested_style: Visual style keywords (e.g., "clean minimal, white background, flat lay" or "bold editorial, high contrast, dramatic lighting")
3. color_suggestions: 2-3 specific colors or palette description (e.g., "deep navy #1a2744, warm gold #f0b429, white space dominant")
4. text_on_image: Exact text to overlay, font weight suggestion, placement (e.g., "Headline: 'Stop guessing.' — Bold, top third. Subline: 'Here's what actually works.' — Regular, center.")
5. nano_banana_prompt: Complete Nano Banana 2 image generation prompt in format: [subject + action], [environment/setting], [lighting type], [camera angle], [style/mood], [color grading], [aspect ratio e.g. --ar 4:5]

For each post output:
## [Post Title] — Visual Brief
Platform: [platform] | Format: [format]

**visual_brief:** [under 30 words]
**suggested_style:** [style keywords]
**color_suggestions:** [colors]
**text_on_image:** [text and placement]
**nano_banana_prompt:** [complete prompt, under 100 words]

Briefs must reflect {{brand_name}}'s tone ({{tone}}) and feel native to {{platforms}}.
prompts.ar:
أنت مدير إبداعي. أنشئ ملخصات توجيه بصري جاهزة للمصمم لكل منشور معتمد لـ {{brand_name}} (المجال: {{niche}}، النبرة: {{tone}}). المنصات: {{platforms}}.

كل ملخص يجب أن يكون أقل من 80 كلمة ويحتوي على 5 حقول:
1. visual_brief: وصف المشهد البصري
2. suggested_style: كلمات الأسلوب البصري
3. color_suggestions: 2-3 ألوان محددة
4. text_on_image: النص المطلوب على الصورة وموضعه
5. nano_banana_prompt: بروم Nano Banana 2 الكامل بالتنسيق: [موضوع + فعل], [بيئة], [إضاءة], [زاوية], [أسلوب], [تدريج لوني], [نسبة أبعاد]

activities.name: Export Calendar
activities.description: Export as PDF or XLSX with all sheets: Calendar, Full Posts, Repurposed Versions, Hashtags & Briefs

prompts.en: Export calendar following stage 8 template. Option A: PDF with cover, TOC, calendar grid, post pages. Option B: XLSX with 4 sheets.
prompts.ar: تصدير التقويم وفقاً لقالب المرحلة 8. الخيار أ: PDF. الخيار ب: XLSX.
